'''Bot-Un''' was a [[Domed city/Legends|domed city]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. It was located in one of the planet's rifts.<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> Inhabitants of Bot-Un recalled interaction with [[Plett]].
